combined_text: paratactic paratactic Also found in: Medical, Wikipedia .par·a·tax·is (păr′ə-tăk′sĭs)n. The juxtaposition of clauses or phrases without the use of coordinating or subordinatingconjunctions, as It was cold; the snows came. [Greek, a placing side by side, from paratassein, to arrange side by side : para-, beside
